caseStudyNotes.lacework: This cloud security redesign mirrors the complexity of managing visibility across sprawling infrastructure — similar challenges to those faced by Google Cloud Console teams.
caseStudyNotes.meteor: The trust calibration framework I designed parallels challenges in enterprise ML tooling: how do you help expert users trust automated outputs without removing their agency?

caseStudyNotes.lacework: The information architecture redesign I led required balancing power-user density with progressive disclosure — a tension familiar to anyone building internal tools at Meta's scale.
caseStudyNotes.engram: Engram tackles the context bottleneck in AI-assisted engineering — the same challenge any team building with LLMs at scale faces: how do you make institutional knowledge persist across sessions when the model forgets everything between conversations?
